title: Bradenton Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Bradenton, with a Z-Score of +4.80. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Bradenton are extreme, with a heat index exacerbated by 49% humidity. 
 The wind speed of 16.1 km/h is not sufficient to provide relief from the heat. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 15.8 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling systems.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
